zh.lifeSummary: Johanna von Montfort於1268年之前出生。她和von Savoyen至少有3個女兒。她去世於大約1300年。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Johanna von Montfort于1268年之前出生。她和von Savoyen至少有3个女儿。她去世于大约1300年。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: Johanna von Montfort was born before 1268. She had at least 3 daughters with von Savoyen. She died about 1300.

fr.lifeSummary: Johanna von Montfort est née avant 1268. Elle a eu au moins 3 filles avec von Savoyen. Elle est décédée environ 1300.

de.lifeSummary: Johanna von Montfort wurde vor 1268 geboren. Sie hatte mit von Savoyen mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1300.

it.lifeSummary: Johanna von Montfort è nata il prima del 1268. Lei avuto almeno 3 figlie con von Savoyen. Morì circa 1300.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna von Montfortは1268年以前に生まれた。彼女はvon Savoyenとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1300年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna von Montfort(은)는 1268년 이전 태어났다. 그녀는 von Savoyen(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1300년 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Johanna von Montfort nasceu antes 1268. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhas com von Savoyen. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1300.

ru.lifeSummary: Johanna von Montfort родилась перед 1268 г. У неё было по крайней мере 3 дочери от von Savoyen. Она умерла около 1300 г.
